channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A07 - W17A04 - W17A03 - W17A02 - W17A01 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:38 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A07
- Rack W17A04
- Rack W17A03
- Rack W17A02
- Rack W17A01

Start time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A09 - W17A10 - W17A11 - W17A14 - W17B08 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 16, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:32 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A09
- Rack W17A10
- Rack W17A11
- Rack W17A14
- Rack W17B08

Start time : 16/07/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 16/07/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jul 2, 23:30 UTC  -  Jul 3, 02:30 UTC

Jun 16, 21:01 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in GRA1.

List of concerned racks :
- G107A04
- G107A05
- G107A06
- G107A08
- G107A09
- G107A11
- G107A12
- G107A13
- G107A14
- G107A15
- G107B04
- G107B07
- G107B08
- G107B11
- G107B14
- G107B15
- G108A03
- G108A04
- G122B12
- G122B13
- G122B14
- G122B15

Start time : 02/07/2026 23:30 UTC
End time : 03/07/2026 02:30 UTC
Service impact : Network disruption and temporary loss of vRack access may occur during the maintenance window.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be performing maintenance on a network device.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA2][Infrastructure] - Rack G263B14 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 30, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

Jun 11, 16:43 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure in Rack G263B14.

Start time : 30/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Customers could experience a temporary reboot or shutdown in the worst case of their servers.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM][Storage and Backups] - Enterprise File Storage maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 30, 05:00 - 11:00 UTC

Jun 15, 15:25 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Storage and Backups offer.

Start time : 30/06/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 30/06/2026 11:00 UTC
Service impact : Some Storage Enterprise File Storage services used with vRack Services will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 1 minute during the maintenance period.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Storage infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks L104A15/18 and L104B03/08/09 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 25, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 26, 04:00 UTC

Jun 4, 13:28 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the racks L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09.

Start time : 25/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 26/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified racks from L104A15/A18 and L104B03/B08/B09 to L104B02/B06.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks L104A04/05/07/08/10 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 24, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 25, 04:00 UTC

Jun 4, 13:26 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the racks L104A04/05/07/08/10.

Start time : 24/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 25/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified racks from L104A04/05/07/08/10 to L104B05.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L104B06 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 23, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 24, 04:00 UTC

Jun 4, 13:21 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the rack L104B06.

Start time : 23/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 24/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified rack from L104B06 to L104A01 L104A02 L104A03.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L104B05 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 22, 20:00 UTC  -  Jun 23, 04:00 UTC

Jun 4, 13:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on servers located in the rack L104B05.

Start time : 22/06/2026 20:00 UTC
End time : 23/06/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified rack will be temporarily unavailable for up to 8 hours during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be moving servers in the specified rack from L104B05 to L104B01 L104B02 L104B03 L104B04.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM][Virtual Private Servers] - Some instances incident notification
item.description:
Jun 19, 18:46 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Virtual Private Servers offering in LIM region has been resolved.

Start time : 19/06/2026 17:15 UTC
End time : 19/06/2026 18:44 UTC
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 19, 18:09 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Virtual Private Servers offer on the specific LIM region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/06/2026 17:11 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some Virtual Private Servers instances in LIM region are suddenly unreachable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their Virtual Private Servers instances located in LIM region.
Root Cause : A service disruption occurred due to an unexpected underlying infrastructure malfunction.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX6][Dedicated Servers] - Room 46I incident notification
item.description:
Jun 19, 19:12 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific room 46I.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/06/2026 19:10 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the room 46I are temporarily unavailable.
The majority of the servers are no longer impacted.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located in the specified room.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Jun 19, 18:01 UTC
Update - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering, which is causing temporary availability issue in the room 46I.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/06/2026 17:40 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the room 46I are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located in the specified room.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 19, 17:53 UTC
Investigating - We are currently experiencing an event affecting our Dedicated Servers offer.

Our teams are fully committed to investigating this issue and working towards a resolution as soon as possible. As investigations are ongoing, we will share any new findings or updates with you as soon as possible.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [LIM3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack LIM0303B01A incident Notification
item.description:
Jun 19, 15:24 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering on rack LIM0303B01A has been resolved.

Start time : 19/06/2026 14:30 UTC
End time : 19/06/2026 14:50 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 19, 14:48 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack LIM0303B01A.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/06/2026 14:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in the rack LIM0303B01A were no longer able to access the vRack network.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access and use their servers through vRack private network.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [LIM3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack LIM0303B04B incident notification
item.description:
Jun 19, 13:24 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack LIM0303B04B.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/06/2026 11:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack LIM0303B04B are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located in the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R827B02A and R827B02B incident notification
item.description:
Jun 19, 17:06 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Servers in rack R827B02B are no longer impacted by this incident.
Our teams are currently working on the last impacted servers located in rack R827B02A .
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 19, 15:07 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : The majority of the servers are no longer impacted by the incident.
Our teams are currently working on the last impacted ones.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 19, 11:22 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific Rack R827B02A and R827B02B.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 19/06/2026 11:14 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack R827B02A and R827B02B are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G131B15 notification incident
item.description:
Jun 18, 18:23 UTC

Start time : 18/06/2026 16:56 UTC
End time : 18/06/2026 17:36 UTC

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 18, 18:11 UTC

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 18/06/2026 16:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Public network was temporarily unavailable in the rack G131B15.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access and use their servers through Public network.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 18/06/2026 16:56 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Public network is temporarily unavailable in the rack G131B15.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their servers through Public network.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident to fix it.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack RBX0840B05A notification incident
item.description:
Jun 17, 22:53 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 17/06/2026 17:40 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 22:34 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a cooling system issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 17, 20:07 UTC
Update - Please find an update of this incident below :

Update: The public network has been restored and some of affected servers are now available again.
However, the vRack network remains unavailable.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are currently replacing the affected network equipment to restore vRack connectivity and fully recover the impacted services as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 17, 18:47 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Start time : 17/06/2026 17:40 UTC

Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a cooling system issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [RBX6][Cooling System] - Rack 46N09 maintenance notification
item.description:
Jun 17, 06:27 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 16, 15:20 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 16, 15:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, a maintenance is scheduled on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 16/06/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R809L14 incident notification
